{# ── Vendor Information Card ───────────────────────────────────────────── #}

Vendor Information

{# Row 1 #}
Phone {{ vendor.phone|default:"N/A" }}
Email {{ vendor.email|default:"N/A" }}
{# Row 2 #}
Designation {{ vendor.designation|default:"N/A" }}
Contact Person {% if vendor.contact_person %}{{ vendor.contact_person }}{% else %}N/A{% endif %}
{# Row 3 #}
Address {{ vendor.address.address_line_one|default:"N/A" }}
GSTIN Number {{ vendor.gstin_number|default:"N/A" }}
{# Row 4 #}
State {{ vendor.address.state|default:"N/A" }}
Country {{ vendor.address.country|default:"N/A" }}
{# Description - Full Width #}
Description
{{ vendor.description|default:"No description available."|urlize }}
{# Row 5 #}
City {{ vendor.address.city|default:"N/A" }}
Pincode {{ vendor.address.pin_code|default:"N/A" }}
{# ── Custom Fields ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────── #} {% if get_custom_data %}

Custom Fields

{% for cf in get_custom_data %} {% endfor %}
Field Name Field Value
{{ cf.field_name }} {{ cf.field_value }}
{% endif %} {# ── Asset List ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────── #} {% if assets_page_object %}

Asset List

{% for asset in assets_page_object %} {% empty %} {% endfor %}
Sl No. Asset Serial Number Asset Name
{{ assets_page_object.start_index|add:forloop.counter0|stringformat:"02d" }} {{ asset.serial_no|default:"######" }}
{{ asset.name|default:"Unnamed Asset" }}
No assets assigned to this vendor.

{% endif %} {# ── History Section ───────────────────────────────────────────────────── #}
